title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in France
summary_full: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.
summary_public: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.
